title: ardisia eciliata
intro: Ardisia eciliata, also known as the Chinese ardisia or red berried myrtle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving circulation, and reducing fever, among others. Ardisia eciliata is often prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and it can also be used to make infusions and other herbal preparations.
